records.query: How much does an Opel Astra cost?
chunks: The price of Opel Astra depends on the regional markets.
The Opel Astra price is about 9M HUF in the 2024 price listings.
The Gellert Hill is in Budapest.
records.reference_response: The Opel Astra price is about 9M HUF in the 2024 price listings.
records.actual_response: The Opel Astra costs around 9M HUF according to 2024 listings.

records.query: How big is the luggage rack of an Opel Astra?
chunks: The price of Opel Astra depends on the regional markets.
The Opel Astra price is about 9M HUF in the 2024 price listings.
The Gellert Hill is in Budapest.
records.reference_response: The luggage rack of an Opel Astra amounts 300 liters.
records.actual_response: The luggage rack is about 300 liters.
